title: helianthemum italicum subsp. oelandicum
intro: Helianthemum italicum subsp. oelandicum, also known as rockrose, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the Cistaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as wound healing, antioxidant activity, and anti-cancer properties, making it a potential natural remedy for various health conditions. Rockrose can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
